description: Bill of divorce. Dated: Thursday, 27 Adar I 1540 Seleucid, which is 1229 CE. Location: Fustat. Husband: Avraham b. מימאן(?). Wife: [Miryam] bt. Ḥabīb. On verso there is the statement that Miryam received her geṭ, but instead of a signature, it just has "peloni b. peloni."
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
